title: Arcath Tales
description:
Arcath Tales is a light roguelike adventure that blends RPG progression with gacha-driven character collection and strategic team building.

-

Set in a mysterious fantasy world, a colossal World Tree rises above all, its sprawling branches sustaining nine great realms. Bathed in its radiant glow, life flourishes through endless cycles of growth and rebirth. Over generations, civilization thrived, with humans and forest spirits emerging as the two most prominent peoples beneath the canopy.

Yet beneath this prosperity, a looming threat awakens. A suffocating mist begins to spread across the ancient first realm, corrupting living beings and turning them into fearsome monsters. As the balance of the world teeters, humans gifted with purifying power and forest spirits who command elemental forces stand together on the front lines.

You play as a human explorer chosen by the Pioneers' Alliance. Through summoning and cultivating powerful forest spirits, you will venture deep into corrupted lands, confront formidable enemies, uncover hidden truths, and shape the fate of the realms.

-

-

Key features:

-

[Exploration & Puzzle-Driven Adventure with Rich Lore]

Venture through mist-covered continents and expansive main story maps. Experience light roguelike exploration blended with environmental puzzles, branching routes, and unpredictable encounters. Face hundreds of uniquely designed monsters and bosses across a wide range of PvE challenges.

-

[Fully Customizable Forest Spirit Skills]

Every forest spirit card supports free skill configuration. Choose from hundreds of active and passive abilities, then tailor each spirit to its combat role. Strategic combinations allow you to build lineups that match your personal playstyle rather than fixed templates.

-

[Elemental & Role-Based Strategic Combat]

Forest spirits are divided into distinct elements and battlefield roles such as attackers, defenders, and supporters. Elemental advantages and role synergies play a key part in combat, rewarding thoughtful team composition and tactical planning.

-

[Flexible Protagonist Growth & Build Freedom]

Your main character is not locked into a single path. Attribute points can be freely allocated, allowing you to develop different builds — from high-damage dealers to durable frontliners or balanced hybrids — adding long-term depth to progression.

-

[Spirit Awakening & Advanced Progression]

Forest spirits can be awakened through progression systems, unlocking additional skill slots and enhanced combat potential. Awakening deepens customization and gives veteran players new strategic layers to explore.

-

[Deep Appearance Customization Beyond Costumes]

Defeating monsters rewards a variety of equipment drops. Equipping different gear pieces changes your character's visual appearance in real time. While farming and upgrading equipment, you can freely shape your look, and completing achievements unlocks stylish outfits for further customization.
description_short: A fantasy roguelike RPG with gacha heroes, strategic team building, and endless replayable runs. Explore a world tree, fight monsters, and shape your own build.
